name: workflow-design-bible
description: Marketplace for the Loop Design Bible plugin — design self-running agent loops, and scaffold the constitution that runs them.

plugins.name: workflow-design-bible
plugins.description: The Loop Design Bible: design self-running agent loops with the eight-part architecture (Trigger, Context Injection, Agent Role, Tools, Verification, State, Retry, Escalation), plus a constitution generator that interviews you and scaffolds a lean CLAUDE.md constitution, a brand configuration.json, and a documentation/ skeleton around a CEO-orchestrated architecture.
